assertions.title: Approve click triggers wallet connect when disconnected

steps.action: Navigate to app and submit comparison (USDC→WETH on Base)
steps.observed: Results displayed with step 1 Approve and step 2 Swap (disabled) buttons

steps.action: Inject mock ERC-6963 wallet provider via page.evaluate()
steps.observed: Mock wallet injected, responds to eip6963:requestProvider

steps.action: Click Approve button with no wallet connected
steps.observed: Wallet provider menu appeared showing 'Frame' and 'Mock Wallet' options

steps.action: Click Approve (no wallet) to open wallet provider menu
steps.observed: Menu appeared with Frame and Mock Wallet

steps.action: Select Mock Wallet from provider menu
steps.expected: Wallet connects then auto-approve fires (eth_sendTransaction sent without second click)
steps.observed: Wallet connected. Request log shows: eth_requestAccounts → eth_call (x2 balance checks) → eth_chainId → eth_sendTransaction (approve calldata 0x095ea7b3... to USDC token) → eth_getTransactionReceipt

evidence.network: Mock wallet received eth_requestAccounts then eth_sendTransaction automatically

assertions.title: Approve works when wallet already connected

steps.action: Reload page, inject mock wallet, connect via Connect Wallet → Mock Wallet
steps.observed: Wallet connected showing Mock Wallet address, Approve button clickable

steps.action: Clear request log then click Approve (wallet already connected)
steps.observed: Request log shows: eth_chainId → eth_sendTransaction (approve calldata) → eth_getTransactionReceipt. No eth_requestAccounts. Button changed to 'Approved ✓' (disabled), Swap button enabled.

evidence.network: Mock wallet received eth_sendTransaction directly (no eth_requestAccounts)

assertions.title: User cancels wallet connect during approve flow

steps.action: Disconnect wallet to return to disconnected state
steps.expected: Connect Wallet button visible, wallet disconnected message
steps.observed: UI shows Connect Wallet button and 'Wallet disconnected.' message

steps.expected: Form intact with results and Approve/Swap buttons
steps.observed: Form shows results with Approve and Swap (disabled) buttons
Wallet provider menu appeared with Frame and Mock Wallet options

steps.action: Click outside the wallet provider menu (on page heading)
steps.expected: Menu dismissed, UI returns to prior state
steps.observed: Wallet provider menu hidden. UI returned to prior state: Connect Wallet button visible, form intact, Approve button still available, no error messages

evidence.network: No wallet requests made (menu dismissed before selection)

steps.action: Reload page, inject mock wallet, connect wallet
Click Approve to enable Swap button
steps.observed: Approve button changed to 'Approved ✓' (disabled), Swap button enabled (disabled=false, no .disabled class)

steps.expected: Wallet disconnected, Swap button remains clickable with wallet-required class
steps.observed: Wallet disconnected. Swap button has classes 'tx-btn swap-btn wallet-required', disabled=false

steps.action: Clear request log then click Swap (no wallet)
steps.observed: Wallet provider menu appeared with Frame and Mock Wallet options

steps.action: Select Mock Wallet from provider menu
steps.expected: Wallet connects then auto-swap fires (eth_sendTransaction sent to router)
steps.observed: Request log shows: eth_requestAccounts → eth_call (x2 balance checks) → eth_chainId → eth_sendTransaction (swap calldata to router 0x0D05a7D3...) → eth_getTransactionReceipt

evidence.network: Mock wallet received eth_requestAccounts then eth_sendTransaction (swap) automatically

frictions.description: Browser context kept crashing/closing between test steps, requiring multiple Chrome process kills and restarts
frictions.resolution: Killed all Chrome mcp-chrome processes between test sessions and re-navigated. Used browser_run_code for complex multi-step flows to avoid context loss.

frictions.description: Auto-refresh (15s interval) regenerates result cards, resetting approve/swap button states. This interfered with VAL-UI-034 which requires maintaining approved state across disconnect.
frictions.resolution: Cleared all intervals via page.evaluate() before performing the approve→disconnect→swap sequence. Documented in user-testing.md as known quirk.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. VAL-UI-030 confirmed approve button opens wallet provider menu when disconnected. VAL-UI-031 confirmed auto-approve fires after wallet connect (eth_requestAccounts → eth_sendTransaction with no second click). VAL-UI-032 confirmed approve sends tx directly when wallet already connected. VAL-UI-033 confirmed dismissing wallet menu returns UI to prior state cleanly. VAL-UI-034 confirmed swap button triggers connect then auto-submits swap transaction to the router.
